Name: AWorldSettings
Description: Actor containing all script accessible world properties.

Variables.Name: bEnableFOVDistanceCulling
Variables.Description: FOV Distance Culling

Variables.Name: bEnableWorldBoundsChecks
Variables.Description:
DEFAULT BASIC PHYSICS SETTINGS 
	 If true, enables CheckStillInWorld checks

Variables.Name: bEnableNavigationSystem
Variables.Description: if set to false navigation system will not get created (and all navigation functionality won't be accessible)

Variables.Name: bEnableAISystem
Variables.Description: if set to false AI system will not get created. Use it to disable all AI-related activity on a map

Variables.Name: bEnableWorldComposition
Variables.Description:
Enables tools for composing a tiled world.
	  Level has to be saved and all sub-levels removed before enabling this option.

Variables.Name: bUseClientSideLevelStreamingVolumes
Variables.Description:
Enables client-side streaming volumes instead of server-side.
	  Expected usage scenario: server has all streaming levels always loaded, clients independently stream levels inout based on streaming volumes.

Variables.Name: bEnableWorldOriginRebasing
Variables.Description: World origin will shift to a camera position when camera goes far away from current origin

Variables.Name: bWorldGravitySet
Variables.Description: if set to true, when we call GetGravityZ we assume WorldGravityZ has already been initialized and skip the lookup of DefaultGravityZ and GlobalGravityZ

Variables.Name: bGlobalGravitySet
Variables.Description: If set to true we will use GlobalGravityZ instead of project setting DefaultGravityZ

Variables.Name: DefaultGameMode
Variables.Description:
GAMEMODE SETTINGS 
	 The default GameMode to use when starting this map in the game. If this value is NULL, the INI setting for default game type is used.

Variables.Name: GameNetworkManagerClass
Variables.Description: Class of GameNetworkManager to spawn for network games

Variables.Name: PackedLightAndShadowMapTextureSize
Variables.Description:
RENDERING SETTINGS 
	 Maximum size of textures for packed light and shadow maps

Variables.Name: bMinimizeBSPSections
Variables.Description:
Causes the BSP build to generate as few sections as possible.
	  This is useful when you need to reduce draw calls but can reduce texture streaming efficiency and effective lightmap resolution.
	  Note - changes require a rebuild to propagate.  Also, be sure to select all surfaces and make sure they all have the same flags to minimize section count.

Variables.Name: DefaultColorScale
Variables.Description: Default color scale for the level

Variables.Name: DefaultMaxDistanceFieldOcclusionDistance
Variables.Description: Max occlusion distance used by mesh distance fields, overridden if there is a movable skylight.

Variables.Name: GlobalDistanceFieldViewDistance
Variables.Description: Distance from the camera that the global distance field should cover.

Variables.Name: DynamicIndirectShadowsSelfShadowingIntensity
Variables.Description:
Controls the intensity of self-shadowing from capsule indirect shadows.
	  These types of shadows use approximate occluder representations, so reducing self-shadowing intensity can hide those artifacts.

Variables.Name: bPrecomputeVisibility
Variables.Description:
PRECOMPUTED VISIBILITY SETTINGS 
	
	  Whether to place visibility cells inside Precomputed Visibility Volumes and along camera tracks in this level.
	  Precomputing visibility reduces rendering thread time at the cost of some runtime memory and somewhat increased lighting build times.

Variables.Name: bPlaceCellsOnlyAlongCameraTracks
Variables.Description: Whether to place visibility cells only along camera tracks or only above shadow casting surfaces.

Variables.Name: VisibilityCellSize
Variables.Description:
World space size of precomputed visibility cells in x and y.
	  Smaller sizes produce more effective occlusion culling at the cost of increased runtime memory usage and lighting build times.

Variables.Name: PlayAreaHeight
Variables.Description: Play Area Height ( Cell Z

Variables.Name: DynamicCellSize
Variables.Description: Dynamic Cell Size ( Dynamic Cell XY, Z

Variables.Name: VisibilityAggressiveness
Variables.Description:
Determines how aggressive precomputed visibility should be.
	  More aggressive settings cull more objects but also cause more visibility errors like popping.

Variables.Name: bForceNoPrecomputedLighting
Variables.Description:
LIGHTMASS RELATED SETTINGS 
	
	  Whether to force lightmaps and other precomputed lighting to not be created even when the engine thinks they are needed.
	  This is useful for improving iteration in levels with fully dynamic lighting and shadowing.
	  Note that any lighting and shadowing interactions that are usually precomputed will be lost if this is enabled.

Variables.Name: DefaultReverbSettings
Variables.Description:
AUDIO SETTINGS 
	 Default reverb settings used by audio volumes.

Variables.Name: DefaultAmbientZoneSettings
Variables.Description: Default interior settings used by audio volumes.

Variables.Name: DefaultBaseSoundMix
Variables.Description: Default Base SoundMix.

Variables.Name: WorldToMeters
Variables.Description:
DEFAULT SETTINGS 
	 scale of 1uu to 1m in real world measurements, for HMD and other physically tracked devices (e.g. 1uu = 1cm would be 100.0)

Variables.Name: MonoCullingDistance
Variables.Description: Distance from the player after which content will be rendered in mono if monoscopic far field rendering is activated

Variables.Name: BookMarks
Variables.Description:
EDITOR ONLY SETTINGS 
	 Level Bookmarks: 10 should be MAX_BOOKMARK_NUMBER @fixmeconst

Variables.Name: TimeDilation
Variables.Description:
Normally 1 - scales real time passage.
	  Warning - most use cases should use GetEffectiveTimeDilation() instead of reading from this directly

Variables.Name: MinGlobalTimeDilation
Variables.Description: Lowest acceptable global time dilation.

Variables.Name: MaxGlobalTimeDilation
Variables.Description: Highest acceptable global time dilation.

Variables.Name: MinUndilatedFrameTime
Variables.Description: Smallest possible frametime, not considering dilation. Equiv to 1FastestFPS.

Variables.Name: MaxUndilatedFrameTime
Variables.Description: Largest possible frametime, not considering dilation. Equiv to 1SlowestFPS.

Variables.Name: bHighPriorityLoading
Variables.Description: when this flag is set, more time is allocated to background loading (replicated)

Variables.Name: bHighPriorityLoadingLocal
Variables.Description: copy of bHighPriorityLoading that is not replicated, for clientside-only loading operations

Variables.Name: ReplicationViewers
Variables.Description:
valid only during replication - information about the player(s) being replicated to
	  (there could be more than one in the case of a splitscreen client)

Variables.Name: AssetUserData
Variables.Description: Array of user data stored with the asset

Variables.Name: bEnableHierarchicalLODSystem
Variables.Description: if set to true, hierarchical LODs will be built, which will create hierarchical LODActors

Variables.Name: HLODSetupAsset
Variables.Description: If set overrides the level settings and global project settings

Variables.Name: OverrideBaseMaterial
Variables.Description: If set overrides the project-wide base material used for Proxy Materials

Variables.Name: HierarchicalLODSetup
Variables.Description: Hierarchical LOD Setup

Variables.Name: bGenerateSingleClusterForLevel
Variables.Description: if set to true, all eligible actors in this level will be added to a single cluster representing the entire level (used for small sublevels)
